title: Softly Roasted Mexican Flour Tacos
description: A light and creamy Mexican dish featuring roasted ingredients and plain flour, suitable for an ayurvedic-tamasic friendly diet. This recipe is easy to make and requires minimal ingredients.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, toss the sliced zucchini, bell peppers, and onions with 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil and season with salt.
Spread the vegetables on a baking sheet and roast in the oven for 20 minutes.
In a small bowl, mix the minced garlic with the sour cream.
Warm the flour tortillas by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20 seconds.
Assemble the tacos by spooning the roasted vegetables onto a tortilla and topping with a dollop of garlic sour cream and shredded cheese.
Garnish with chopped cilantro and serve immediately.
Repeat the assembly process for the remaining ingredients.
